title: UltraSpawner
description: UltraSpawner is a plugin that adds custom spawners with a dedicated spawner shop, upgradeable spawners, and dynamic holograms displaying spawner information in real time
body:
# UltraSpawner ![presentation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/389789eb80add1159c7077cb9de2f00bd3d74781.png) ## 📦 Requirements - Spigot / Paper **1.21+** - **Vault** (required for economy features) - An economy plugin (EssentialsX, CMI, etc.) --- | Command | Arguments | Description | Permission | Notes | |---------|-----------|------------|------------|-------| | `/ultraspawner` | — | Opens the spawner menu for the player | `ultraspawner.use` | Only usable by players | | `/ultraspawner reload` | — | Reloads the plugin configuration | `ultraspawner.reload` | Can be used by ops or players with permission | | `/ultraspawner give ` | `player`: target player
`entity`: spawner type | Gives a spawner of the specified type to a player | `ultraspawner.give` | The entity must be in `VALID_SPAWNERS` | --- ## Spawners shop ![spawners shop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c22f0cce2eed76fd3b3294a993c3eb7928929f25.png) ## Spawners levels config ![spawners levels config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eadaf22fc0eb8025b4fd27e163d664b6999b7c80_0.webp) ## Spawner item ![spawner item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6dbfb28863f33c6a7466362ade61ad2e4ef5f47.png) ## Spawner with him hologram ![spawner hologram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19c6669a02d574e18b07d2867b9fa2e571ef7be3.png)
